title: Tennessee Association of Disability Examiners, Inc. (TADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Tennessee Association of Disability Examiners, Inc. (TADE), a NADE state chapter in the Southeast Region. The constitution covers name, relationships, definitions, purposes, membership (July 1 to June 30 membership year), meetings (monthly business meetings), elections and nominations, officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary, Treasurer, Parliamentarian, and an even-year-elected Regional Board Member), board of directors, committees, parliamentary authority, by-laws, and amendments; the by-laws restate membership, administration, board of directors, committees, and amendment procedure. Ratified by the membership 26 July 2007.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Tennessee (TADE) Chapter
source.title: Tennessee Association of Disability Examiners, Inc. Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Tennessee-Const-Bylaws.docx. The document ends 'Ratified by the Membership: 7-26-2007' (26 July 2007), captured as temporal_coverage. TADE is an incorporated chapter ('Inc.') with a TADE Corporate Officer role and state annual-report filings. Minor heading typos from the conversion ('ARTICE', 'MICELLANEOUS'). Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
